tickets.description: Specify directory layout and locking strategy for journal/snapshot/checkpoint per project.

tickets.description: Define event types and common fields for journal entries.

Remove legacy tracking updates

tickets.title: Implement roll-forward replay

tickets.description: Expose API to rebuild agent state for 'continue' sessions.
